function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {
    let prefixSum = 0;
    let dp = 0;
    const map: Record<number, number> = { 0: 0 };
    for (const num of nums) {
        prefixSum += num;
        const remainder = prefixSum % k;
        // Get the max_val for this remainder
        const maxVal = map[remainder] ?? -Infinity;
        const candidate = prefixSum + maxVal;
        // Compute new_dp
        const new_dp = Math.max(dp, candidate);
        // Update the map for this remainder
        const currentVal = map[remainder] ?? -Infinity;
        if (new_dp - prefixSum > currentVal) {
            map[remainder] = new_dp - prefixSum;
        }
        dp = new_dp;
    }
    return prefixSum - dp;
}

function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {
    let prefixSum = 0;
    let dp = 0;
    const map: Record<number, number> = { 0: 0 };
    for (const num of nums) {
        prefixSum += num;
        const remainder = prefixSum % k;
        // Get the max_val for this remainder
        const maxVal = map[remainder] ?? -Infinity;
        const candidate = prefixSum + maxVal;
        // Compute new_dp
        const new_dp = Math.max(dp, candidate);
        // Update the map for this remainder
        const currentVal = map[remainder] ?? -Infinity;
        if (new_dp - prefixSum > currentVal) {
            map[remainder] = new_dp - prefixSum;
        }
        dp = new_dp;
    }
    return prefixSum - dp;
}

function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {
    let prefixSum = 0;
    let dp = 0;
    const map: Record<number, number> = { 0: 0 };
    for (const num of nums) {
        prefixSum += num;
        const remainder = prefixSum % k;
        // Get the max_val for this remainder
        const maxVal = map[remainder] ?? -Infinity;
        const candidate = prefixSum + maxVal;
        // Compute new_dp
        const new_dp = Math.max(dp, candidate);
        // Update the map for this remainder
        const currentVal = map[remainder] ?? -Infinity;
        if (new_dp - prefixSum > currentVal) {
            map[remainder] = new_dp - prefixSum;
        }
        dp = new_dp;
    }
    return prefixSum - dp;
}
